languages.text: {n}Корпус устройства выполнен чрезвычайно искусно — он идеально входит в проем, почти не оставляя зазора между собой и камнем. Внутренние механизмы и кабели устройства аккуратно уложены в глубине, точно затаившиеся в темноте змеи.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Корпус устройства выполнен чрезвычайно искусно — он идеально входит в проем, почти не оставляя зазора между собой и камнем. Внутренние механизмы и кабели устройства аккуратно уложены в глубине, точно затаившиеся в темноте змеи.{/n}

languages.text: {n}The device housing has been made with exquisite skill — it fits perfectly into the niche, leaving almost no gap between itself and the stone. The internal workings and cables are neatly tucked away, like snakes lurking in the dark.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Корпус устройства выполнен чрезвычайно искусно — он идеально входит в проем, почти не оставляя зазора между собой и камнем. Внутренние механизмы и кабели устройства аккуратно уложены в глубине, точно затаившиеся в темноте змеи.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}The device housing has been made with exquisite skill — it fits perfectly into the niche, leaving almost no gap between itself and the stone. The internal workings and cables are neatly tucked away, like snakes lurking in the dark.{/n}

{n}The device housing has been made with exquisite skill — it fits perfectly into the niche, leaving almost no gap between itself and the stone. The internal workings and cables are neatly tucked away, like snakes lurking in the dark.{/n}

{n}The device housing has been made with exquisite skill — it fits perfectly into the niche, leaving almost no gap between itself and the stone. The internal workings and cables are neatly tucked away, like snakes lurking in the dark.{/n}

languages.text: {n}装置的外壳工艺精湛，严丝合缝地嵌入壁龛，几乎紧贴着石壁。内部结构与线缆被整齐地藏匿起来，如同潜伏于黑暗中的蛇。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The device housing has been made with exquisite skill — it fits perfectly into the niche, leaving almost no gap between itself and the stone. The internal workings and cables are neatly tucked away, like snakes lurking in the dark.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}装置的外壳工艺精湛，严丝合缝地嵌入壁龛，几乎紧贴着石壁。内部结构与线缆被整齐地藏匿起来，如同潜伏于黑暗中的蛇。{/n}

languages.text: {n}La fabrication du boîtier de l'appareil a dû nécessiter un talent remarquable. Il se loge parfaitement dans la niche, en ne laissant presque pas d'espace entre lui et la pierre. Les mécanismes et les câbles sont soigneusement rangés à l'intérieur, comme des serpents tapis dans l'obscurité.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The device housing has been made with exquisite skill — it fits perfectly into the niche, leaving almost no gap between itself and the stone. The internal workings and cables are neatly tucked away, like snakes lurking in the dark.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}La fabrication du boîtier de l'appareil a dû nécessiter un talent remarquable. Il se loge parfaitement dans la niche, en ne laissant presque pas d'espace entre lui et la pierre. Les mécanismes et les câbles sont soigneusement rangés à l'intérieur, comme des serpents tapis dans l'obscurité.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Cihazın kasası, mükemmel bir ustalıkla yapılmış. Nişin içine mükemmel bir şekilde oturuyor ve kendisi ile taş arasında neredeyse hiçbir boşluk bırakmıyor. İç işleyişi ve kabloları, karanlıkta pusuda bekleyen yılanlar gibi düzgünce saklanmış.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The device housing has been made with exquisite skill — it fits perfectly into the niche, leaving almost no gap between itself and the stone. The internal workings and cables are neatly tucked away, like snakes lurking in the dark.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Cihazın kasası, mükemmel bir ustalıkla yapılmış. Nişin içine mükemmel bir şekilde oturuyor ve kendisi ile taş arasında neredeyse hiçbir boşluk bırakmıyor. İç işleyişi ve kabloları, karanlıkta pusuda bekleyen yılanlar gibi düzgünce saklanmış.{/n}

languages.text: {n}El armazón del dispositivo está elaborado con una destreza exquisita: encaja perfectamente en su hueco, sin dejar prácticamente ningún espacio entre sí mismo y la piedra. Sus mecanismos internos y sus cables están recogidos con esmero, como serpientes que acechan en las sombras.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The device housing has been made with exquisite skill — it fits perfectly into the niche, leaving almost no gap between itself and the stone. The internal workings and cables are neatly tucked away, like snakes lurking in the dark.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}El armazón del dispositivo está elaborado con una destreza exquisita: encaja perfectamente en su hueco, sin dejar prácticamente ningún espacio entre sí mismo y la piedra. Sus mecanismos internos y sus cables están recogidos con esmero, como serpientes que acechan en las sombras.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Das Gehäuse des Geräts zeugt von enormem handwerklichen Geschick ... es passt perfekt in die Nische und lässt kaum Platz zum Stein. Das Innenleben und die Kabel wurden sorgsam verstaut wie Schlangen, die in der Dunkelheit lauern.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The device housing has been made with exquisite skill — it fits perfectly into the niche, leaving almost no gap between itself and the stone. The internal workings and cables are neatly tucked away, like snakes lurking in the dark.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Das Gehäuse des Geräts zeugt von enormem handwerklichen Geschick ... es passt perfekt in die Nische und lässt kaum Platz zum Stein. Das Innenleben und die Kabel wurden sorgsam verstaut wie Schlangen, die in der Dunkelheit lauern.{/n}

languages.text: {n}この装置の筐体は、非常に巧みに作られています。石の隙間にはめ込まれ、筐体と石の間にほとんど隙間がありません。内部の機構やケーブルは、暗闇に潜む蛇のように、きれいに隠されています。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The device housing has been made with exquisite skill — it fits perfectly into the niche, leaving almost no gap between itself and the stone. The internal workings and cables are neatly tucked away, like snakes lurking in the dark.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}この装置の筐体は、非常に巧みに作られています。石の隙間にはめ込まれ、筐体と石の間にほとんど隙間がありません。内部の機構やケーブルは、暗闇に潜む蛇のように、きれいに隠されています。{/n}
